dataProcessingJobId.description: Job ID of the completed data processing job.

trainModelS3Location.description: S3 location for model artifacts output.

previousModelTrainingJobId.description: Job ID of a previous training job for incremental training.

modelName.description: The model type to train: rgcn (relational graph convolutional network), transe, distmult, rotate, or custom.

baseProcessingInstanceType.description: ML instance type for data preparation step.

trainingInstanceType.description: ML instance type for the training step.

trainingInstanceVolumeSizeInGB.description: Disk volume size for training instance in GB.

maxHPONumberOfTrainingJobs.description: Maximum total training jobs for hyperparameter tuning. Minimum 10 recommended for meaningful results.

enableManagedSpotTraining.description: Whether to use EC2 spot instances for training.

sourceS3DirectoryPath.description: S3 path to the custom training script directory.

trainingEntryPointScript.description: Name of the training entry point script.

transformEntryPointScript.description: Name of the transform entry point script.
